▶ WHAT IS CTRL+WATCH

★

RATINGS

Every channel scored out of 100. No mercy. No algorithm-safe takes. Just honest, loud opinions.

⚔

BOSS FIGHT

Head-to-head battles between creators. Two channels enter. One gets the crown. No rematch clause.

👾

TIME CAPSULE

Fictional interviews with legends who never saw YouTube. What would Cronkite think of MrBeast?

THE MUSIC ISSUE

VIEW ALL ISSUES ▶
"
There was a time when someone else decided what you watched. CTRL+WATCH exists because YouTube deserves what gaming had in the 80s and 90s: a magazine that is loud, opinionated, and unafraid to put a number on things.
— CTRL+WATCH, ISSUE #001
